name: aquamarine evdi/DisplayLink fix
reason: aquamarine 0.11+ broke DisplayLink/evdi: mouse becomes flaky/laggy with dock connected, dock takes 15s+ to connect (was ~10s), drmGetDevice spam and DVI-I-2 applyCommit failures in Hyprland log, eglQueryDeviceStringEXT errors from aquamarine. Tested 0.12.0 on 2026-06-03 — still broken. Rolled back to 0.10.0-4. elogind/libelogind co-pinned because hyprland 0.54.3 links against libelogind-shared-255.so; upgrading elogind to 257 breaks Hyprland startup at TTY1.
